title: Titus Vineyards Tasting
description:
Join us on Wednesday, March 4th from 4–7 PM at Whispering Vine South Creek for a special evening featuring the bold, expressive wines of Titus Vineyards. Known for crafting powerful yet polished Napa Valley reds, Titus delivers depth, character, and classic structure in every bottle.

Tasting Fee: $30 (Buy a bottle from the tasting and your fee is refunded)

Featured Wines:

• Titus Zinfandel 2023 – Bold and fruit-driven with ripe blackberry, boysenberry, and warm spice, finishing vibrant and smooth.

• Titus Cabernet Sauvignon Napa Valley 2022 – Layers of black cherry, cassis, and cedar lead into ripe dark fruit and fine-grained tannins with a long, polished finish.

• Titus Andronicus Napa Valley Red 2021 – A rich, velvety blend with dark berry, plum, tobacco leaf, cocoa, and a lingering, structured finish.

Explore the richness and versatility of Napa Valley through these three standout selections—buy a bottle and your tasting is free.
